name: always_returns_true
reason: The spec would be vacuous if compare_slice always returns true regardless of inputs

name: always_returns_false
reason: The spec would be vacuous if compare_slice always returns false regardless of inputs

name: different_lengths_equal
reason: Slices of different lengths should never be considered equal by the spec

name: single_diff_still_equal
code:
proof fn phi_4_single_diff_still_equal(x: Seq<u8>, y: Seq<u8>, res: bool)
    requires
        res == (x =~= y),
        x.len() == 2,
        y.len() == 2,
        x[0] == y[0],
        x[1] != y[1],
    ensures
        res == true,
{
    // If provable, the spec misses element-wise differences
}
reason: Slices differing at even one position should not be reported as equal

name: equal_slices_return_false
reason: Elementwise-identical slices must be reported as equal, not unequal
